name: llm-narrative-fab-vector
rationale:
Broker email states loan_amount $280,000 explicitly. loan_application doc deliberately omits loan_amount field (broker source is sole authority for LA). Tests LLM narrative invariant: narrative-prose output must NOT FABRICATE canonical values not in canonical_map. Per anti-circularity discipline: spec rationale is 'broker statement is authoritative for INTENT field per R10-G framing; narrative must not invent canonical values not in canonical_map' — externally grounded.

If Vienna's narrative invents a property_value (not provided by broker, not in any doc) or some other canonical field not present in canonical_map, that's a SEMANTIC-INVARIANT VIOLATION. 16th carry-forward candidate per Phase 1 framing: LLM-narrative semantic-invariant discipline as emergent template family from this Phase 5 anchor.
notes: Single-event sequence. Strongest 16th carry-forward candidate. Phase 4 spec authoring: must_not_include assertions for fabricated values (broker provided $280k; narrative must not assert a property_value, appraised_value, or other unspecified canonical fields).
